title: One-on-ones Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger one-on-ones foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: One-on-ones Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: One-on-ones Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good one-on-ones foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
One-on-ones Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
